title: poa spinosa
intro: Poa spinosa, also known as the spiny meadow-grass or prickly poa, is a species of grass in the genus Poa. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and is characterized by its sharp, pointed leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Poa spinosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Poa spinosa include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for topical use.
